description: As part of the Student Life Study 2024, create and activate a LimeSurvey titled 'Weekly Time Allocation Diary - Student Life Study 2024'. The survey must use 'Group-by-group' presentation and include three question groups: 'Daily Activities', 'Sleep and Self-Care', and 'Demographics'. The 'Daily Activities' group requires an 'Array (Numbers)' question to capture hours spent (validated between 0 and 24) on eight activities (Attending classes or lectures, Studying or doing homework, Paid employment or work, Volunteering or community service, Physical exercise or sports, Socializing and social events, Screen-based entertainment, and Commuting or travel) for each day of the week from Monday through Sunday. Log in with admin/Admin1
